Empowering physicians and health systems with AI

OUR STORY

Rad Al co-founder Dr. Jeff Chang is one of America's best-known radiologists and the youngest US radiologist in history. Jeff’s unique insights are why Rad AI is focused on workflow automation in healthcare.

After starting medical school at NYU at age 16 and completing a fellowship in musculoskeletal MRI, Jeff worked overnights as an ER radiologist for 10 years. Troubled by worsening radiologist burnout, the paucity of assistive technology for radiologists, and ever-rising imaging volumes, Jeff decided to take action. He pursued graduate work in machine learning to identify ways in which AI could make radiologists’ lives better. Along the way, Jeff met co-founder Doktor Gurson, a serial entrepreneur with deep technology experience, and Rad AI was conceived soon after in 2018.

Rad AI leverages its own generative AI models trained specifically for radiology and healthcare, along with one of the largest proprietary radiology report datasets in the world, to deliver solutions that save physicians time, reduce burnout, and improve patient care. Today Rad AI is the fastest growing company in generative AI for healthcare, working with over 40% of all US health systems and 9 of the 10 largest US radiology practices.

Co-founders Dr. Jeff Chang (left) and Doktor Gurson (right)

OUR MISSION

Our mission is to empower physicians with Al - saving physicians time, reducing burnout, and improving the quality of patient care.

Meet Our Leadership Team

Dr. Jeff Chang

Co-founder and CPO
  • Youngest radiologist & second youngest doctor in US history
  • 10+ years as a practicing ER radiologist; fellowship in MSK MRI
  • Graduate work in machine learning, deep learning specialization
  • Head of Business AI Panel, ACR Data Science Institute

Doktor Gurson

Co-founder and CEO
  • Serial tech entrepreneur, starting at the age of 16
  • Founded world’s 32nd ICANN-accredited Domain Registrar
  • Multiple startups and acquisitions spanning a 20-year tech career
  • Investor and advisor for a number of prominent startups

Dr. Elizabeth Bergey

CMIO
  • Immediate past President & CEO of Quantum Imaging, leading one of the largest private radiology practices in the US.
  • Former academic pediatric interventional radiologist, with deep expertise in clinical operations and practice management.
  • Radiology technology innovator and entrepreneur.
  • Residency at Cleveland Clinic (Chief Resident), fellowships at Children’s Hospital of Philadelphia & Pittsburgh.

Dr. Andrew Del Gaizo

CMIO
  • Abdominal radiologist at Moffitt Cancer Center and Deputy Director for VA Teleradiology.
  • Deep expertise in clinical leadership, radiology operations, and healthcare innovation.
  • Institutional leader and active ACR committee member.
  • Residency at Emory, fellowship at Mayo Clinic, MBA from Duke University.

Dr. Rishi Seth

CMIO
  • Neuroradiologist at Fairfax Radiological Consultants, specializing in imaging informatics and AI-driven innovation
  • Former Medical Director of Imaging Informatics at RANT, leading AI adoption and workflow transformation.
  • Expert in AI implementation & development, optimizing workflow, productivity, data analytics, interoperability, and UX/UI design.
  • Fellowships in Imaging Informatics (University of Maryland) and Neuroradiology (Northwestern).
